page_content: Course Title Select three credits at the 2xx-level of the following: ENGL271 Writing Poems and Stories: An Introductory Workshop ENGL272 Writing Fiction: An Introductory Workshop ENGL273 Writing Poetry: An Introductory Workshop AASP/ Creative Writing Through The Eyes of African ENGL274 Americans: A Beginning Workshop Select one of the following: ENGL352 Intermediate Fiction Workshop ENGL353 Intermediate Poetry Workshop Select two sections of the following: ENGL498 Advanced Fiction Workshop ENGL499 Advanced Poetry Workshop Select three credits in any upper-level English Literature course Credits 3 3 6 3
